meaning: The criminal act of deliberately setting fire to property, such as buildings, vehicles, or forests.
definition: The criminal act of deliberately setting fire to property, such as buildings, vehicles, or forests.
example: The warehouse fire was investigated as a case of arson after firefighters found containers of gasoline near the entrance.
exampleHindi: अग्निशामकों को प्रवेश द्वार के पास गैसोलीन के कंटेनर मिलने के बाद गोदाम में लगी आग की जांच आगजनी के मामले के रूप में की गई थी।

meaning: A threat or attempt to physically harm someone, which makes the victim fear for their safety.
definition: A threat or attempt to physically harm someone, which makes the victim fear for their safety.
example: He was arrested for assault after screaming threats and raising his fist at a passerby on the street.
exampleHindi: उसे चिल्लाकर धमकी देने और सड़क पर एक राहगीर पर मुक्का तानने के बाद हमला करने के आरोप में गिरफ्तार किया गया था।

example: The argument escalated quickly from shouting to battery when one of the men punched the other in the face.
exampleHindi: बहस तेजी से चिल्लाने से लेकर मारपीट तक बढ़ गई जब एक व्यक्ति ने दूसरे के चेहरे पर मुक्का मार दिया।

meaning: The crime of demanding money or actions from someone by threatening to reveal their secrets or damaging information.
definition: The crime of demanding money or actions from someone by threatening to reveal their secrets or damaging information.
example: The politician refused to give in to the blackmailer's demands to pay money in exchange for keeping his past secret.
exampleHindi: राजनेता ने अपने अतीत को गुप्त रखने के बदले में ब्लैकमेलर की पैसे देने की मांग को मानने से इनकार कर दिया।

meaning: The act of offering, giving, or receiving money or valuable gifts to influence the actions of a person in authority, such as an official or judge.
definition: The act of offering, giving, or receiving money or valuable gifts to influence the actions of a person in authority, such as an official or judge.
example: The contractor was arrested for bribery after attempting to pay a city inspector to overlook safety violations.
exampleHindi: सुरक्षा उल्लंघनों को नज़रअंदाज़ करने के लिए एक शहर निरीक्षक को भुगतान करने का प्रयास करने के बाद ठेकेदार को रिश्वतखोरी के आरोप में गिरफ्तार किया गया था।

meaning: The crime of illegally entering a building, home, or office, usually to steal something inside.
definition: The crime of illegally entering a building, home, or office, usually to steal something inside.
example: The family returned from their vacation to find that their house had been broken into during a burglary.
exampleHindi: परिवार अपनी छुट्टियों से वापस लौटा तो पाया कि उनके घर में चोरी हो गई है।

meaning: A secret plan by two or more people to commit an illegal or harmful act.
definition: A secret plan by two or more people to commit an illegal or harmful act.
example: The three suspects were charged with conspiracy to commit bank robbery before they could carry out their plan.
exampleHindi: तीनों संदिग्धों पर अपनी योजना को अंजाम देने से पहले बैंक डकैती की साजिश रचने का आरोप लगाया गया था।

meaning: Criminal activities carried out using computers, networks, or the internet, such as hacking or identity theft.
definition: Criminal activities carried out using computers, networks, or the internet, such as hacking or identity theft.
example: The bank's security team blocked a cybercrime attempt that aimed to steal customers' login details.
exampleHindi: बैंक की सुरक्षा टीम ने एक साइबर अपराध प्रयास को रोक दिया जिसका उद्देश्य ग्राहकों के लॉगिन विवरण चुराना था।

meaning: The crime of stealing money or property that you were trusted to manage, such as company funds or a client's savings.
definition: The crime of stealing money or property that you were trusted to manage, such as company funds or a client's savings.
example: The accountant was convicted of embezzlement after secretly transferring company funds into his personal bank account.
exampleHindi: अकाउंटेंट को कंपनी के फंड को गुप्त रूप से अपने निजी बैंक खाते में स्थानांतरित करने के बाद गबन का दोषी ठहराया गया था।

meaning: The crime of obtaining money, property, or services from someone through threats of violence, damage to reputation, or abuse of power.
definition: The crime of obtaining money, property, or services from someone through threats of violence, damage to reputation, or abuse of power.
example: The gang members were charged with extortion for forcing local business owners to pay weekly protection fees.
exampleHindi: गिरोह के सदस्यों पर स्थानीय व्यापार मालिकों को साप्ताहिक सुरक्षा शुल्क का भुगतान करने के लिए मजबूर करने के लिए जबरन वसूली का आरोप लगाया गया था।

meaning: A serious crime, such as murder, burglary, or arson, which is typically punished by more than one year in prison.
definition: A serious crime, such as murder, burglary, or arson, which is typically punished by more than one year in prison.
example: The suspect was charged with a felony after police discovered he had stolen over ten thousand dollars from the bank.
exampleHindi: पुलिस को पता चला कि संदिग्ध ने बैंक से दस हजार डॉलर से अधिक की चोरी की थी, जिसके बाद उस पर घोर अपराध का आरोप लगाया गया।

meaning: The crime of falsely making, copying, or altering a document, signature, or object to deceive others for financial gain.
definition: The crime of falsely making, copying, or altering a document, signature, or object to deceive others for financial gain.
example: He was caught trying to cash a check with a signature that police proved was a forgery.
exampleHindi: वह एक हस्ताक्षर वाले चेक को भुनाने की कोशिश करते हुए पकड़ा गया जिसे पुलिस ने साबित कर दिया कि यह जालसाजी था।

meaning: The crime of using deception or lies to gain money, property, or an unfair advantage.
definition: The crime of using deception or lies to gain money, property, or an unfair advantage.
example: The elderly woman fell victim to credit card fraud when someone stole her card details to make online purchases.
exampleHindi: बुजुर्ग महिला क्रेडिट कार्ड धोखाधड़ी का शिकार हो गई जब किसी ने ऑनलाइन खरीदारी करने के लिए उसके कार्ड का विवरण चुरा लिया।

meaning: The legal term for the killing of one human being by another, which can be lawful (like self-defense) or unlawful (like murder).
definition: The legal term for the killing of one human being by another, which can be lawful (like self-defense) or unlawful (like murder).
example: The police launched a homicide investigation after a body was discovered in the river.
exampleHindi: नदी में एक शव मिलने के बाद पुलिस ने हत्या की जांच शुरू की।

meaning: The illegal act of taking someone away by force, usually to demand money or specific conditions for their release.
definition: The illegal act of taking someone away by force, usually to demand money or specific conditions for their release.
example: The wealthy businessman's child was rescued by police three days after the kidnapping took place.
exampleHindi: अपहरण के तीन दिन बाद पुलिस ने धनी व्यापारी के बच्चे को बचा लिया।

meaning: The act of publishing false written statements, pictures, or videos that damage another person's reputation.
definition: The act of publishing false written statements, pictures, or videos that damage another person's reputation.
example: The newspaper had to pay a large fine for libel after printing an article containing unverified lies about the mayor.
exampleHindi: मेयर के बारे में असत्यापित झूठ वाला एक लेख छापने के बाद अखबार को मानहानि के लिए बड़ा जुर्माना देना पड़ा।

meaning: The unlawful killing of a human being without planning it in advance, often happening by accident or in the heat of an argument.
definition: The unlawful killing of a human being without planning it in advance, often happening by accident or in the heat of an argument.
example: The driver was charged with vehicular manslaughter after losing control of his car and causing a fatal accident.
exampleHindi: अपनी कार पर नियंत्रण खोने और एक घातक दुर्घटना का कारण बनने के बाद ड्राइवर पर वाहन हत्या का आरोप लगाया गया था।

meaning: A minor or less serious crime, such as shoplifting or minor vandalism, usually punished by a fine or a short jail stay of less than a year.
definition: A minor or less serious crime, such as shoplifting or minor vandalism, usually punished by a fine or a short jail stay of less than a year.
example: Stealing a loaf of bread from the bakery is classified as a misdemeanor, resulting in a small fine rather than prison.
exampleHindi: बेकरी से ब्रेड की एक रोटी चुराना एक दुष्कर्म के रूप में वर्गीकृत किया गया है, जिसके परिणामस्वरूप जेल की बजाय एक छोटा सा जुर्माना लगाया जा सकता है।

meaning: The unlawful and planned killing of one human being by another.
definition: The unlawful and planned killing of one human being by another.
example: The suspect was charged with first-degree murder because prosecutors found evidence of a planned attack.
exampleHindi: संदिग्ध पर प्रथम-डिग्री हत्या का आरोप लगाया गया क्योंकि अभियोजकों को एक योजनाबद्ध हमले के सबूत मिले।

meaning: The crime of deliberately lying under oath in court after promising to tell the truth.
definition: The crime of deliberately lying under oath in court after promising to tell the truth.
example: The witness was sentenced to prison for perjury after admitting she lied about seeing the defendant at the crime scene.
exampleHindi: गवाह को अपराध स्थल पर प्रतिवादी को देखने के बारे में झूठ बोलने की बात स्वीकार करने के बाद झूठी गवाही के लिए जेल की सजा सुनाई गई थी।

meaning: The crime of stealing money or property directly from a person by using force, violence, or threats.
definition: The crime of stealing money or property directly from a person by using force, violence, or threats.
example: The bank robbery was carried out by two armed individuals who demanded cash from the tellers.
exampleHindi: बैंक डकैती को दो हथियारबंद व्यक्तियों ने अंजाम दिया था, जिन्होंने टेलर से नकदी की मांग की थी।

meaning: The act of stealing goods from a store or shop while pretending to be a customer.
definition: The act of stealing goods from a store or shop while pretending to be a customer.
example: The store manager called the security team when they saw a customer shoplifting perfume on the camera.
exampleHindi: स्टोर मैनेजर ने सुरक्षा टीम को बुलाया जब उन्होंने कैमरे पर एक ग्राहक को दुकान से परफ्यूम चुराते हुए देखा।

meaning: The act of making false spoken statements that damage another person's reputation.
definition: The act of making false spoken statements that damage another person's reputation.
example: The actor sued his former manager for slander after the manager publicly accused him of stealing.
exampleHindi: अभिनेता ने अपने पूर्व मैनेजर पर मानहानि का मुकदमा कर दिया क्योंकि मैनेजर ने उन पर सार्वजनिक रूप से चोरी का आरोप लगाया था।

meaning: The illegal movement of goods, money, or people across a border or into a restricted area.
definition: The illegal movement of goods, money, or people across a border or into a restricted area.
example: Customs officials at the airport caught a passenger smuggling rare animal skins in his suitcase.
exampleHindi: हवाई अड्डे पर सीमा शुल्क अधिकारियों ने एक यात्री को अपने सूटकेस में दुर्लभ जानवरों की खाल की तस्करी करते हुए पकड़ा।

meaning: The illegal practice of deliberately not paying taxes that are owed to the government.
definition: The illegal practice of deliberately not paying taxes that are owed to the government.
example: The wealthy entrepreneur faced severe penalties and prison time for tax evasion by hiding his income abroad.
exampleHindi: धनी उद्यमी को विदेश में अपनी आय छिपाकर कर चोरी करने के लिए गंभीर दंड और जेल की सजा का सामना करना पड़ा।

meaning: The act of stealing someone else's property with no intention of returning it.
definition: The act of stealing someone else's property with no intention of returning it.
example: She reported the theft of her bicycle to the police after it disappeared from the front yard.
exampleHindi: सामने के आँगन से गायब होने के बाद उसने पुलिस को अपनी साइकिल की चोरी की सूचना दी।

meaning: The crime of betraying one's own country, especially by helping its enemies during a war or trying to overthrow the government.
definition: The crime of betraying one's own country, especially by helping its enemies during a war or trying to overthrow the government.
example: The spy was convicted of treason for selling classified military codes to a foreign government.
exampleHindi: जासूस को एक विदेशी सरकार को वर्गीकृत सैन्य कोड बेचने के लिए राजद्रोह का दोषी ठहराया गया था।

meaning: The crime of entering someone else's land, building, or property without permission.
definition: The crime of entering someone else's land, building, or property without permission.
example: The security guard warned the hikers that they were trespassing on private property and ordered them to leave.
exampleHindi: सुरक्षा गार्ड ने पैदल यात्रियों को चेतावनी दी कि वे निजी संपत्ति पर अतिक्रमण कर रहे हैं और उन्हें छोड़ने का आदेश दिया।

meaning: The deliberate destruction, damage, or defacement of public or private property.
definition: The deliberate destruction, damage, or defacement of public or private property.
example: The local park was closed for cleanup after teenagers damaged the benches in an act of vandalism.
exampleHindi: किशोरों द्वारा बर्बरतापूर्ण कार्रवाई में बेंचों को क्षतिग्रस्त करने के बाद स्थानीय पार्क को सफाई के लिए बंद कर दिया गया था।
